nodes.name: Veggie Quesadilla — Smoky Combo
nodes.description: name: Veggie Quesadilla — Smoky Combo | short_description: Veggie quesadilla with a whole-wheat tortilla, cheddar, bell pepper, spinach, and salsa for a smoky, veggie-forward meal. | meal_suggestion:
nodes.premise: Meal: Veggie Quesadilla — Smoky Combo - name: Veggie Quesadilla — Smoky Combo | short_description: Veggie quesadilla with a whole-wheat tortilla, cheddar, bell pepper, spinach, and salsa for a smoky, veggie-forward meal. | meal_suggestion: To lighten it, use reduced-fat cheddar or part-skim cheese; serve with a side of fruit or a simple bean salad for extra fiber and protein. | nutrition_note: Fiber from the whole-wheat tortilla and vegetables; calcium and protein from cheddar; moderate fat from cheese; sodium may be elevated from cheddar and salsa.

nodes.name: Veggie Quesadilla — Sesame Wrap
nodes.description: name: Veggie Quesadilla — Sesame Wrap | short_description: A warm veggie quesadilla on a whole-wheat tortilla filled with cheddar, bell pepper, spinach, and salsa. | meal_suggestion: Pair with a side
nodes.premise: Meal: Veggie Quesadilla — Sesame Wrap - name: Veggie Quesadilla — Sesame Wrap | short_description: A warm veggie quesadilla on a whole-wheat tortilla filled with cheddar, bell pepper, spinach, and salsa. | meal_suggestion: Pair with a side of fruit or a light yogurt. For more protein in a vegetarian option, add black beans or use bean-based alternative; consider reduced-fat cheddar to lower fat. Optional additions: avocado for healthy fats or a green salad to increase volume and micronutrients. | nutrition_note: Fiber from whole-wheat tortilla and vegetables; calcium from cheddar; iron from spinach; vitamins A and C from bell pepper. Moderate sodium from cheese and salsa. To reduce fat and calories, use reduced-fat cheddar and a smaller amount of salsa.

nodes.name: Salmon Salad Wrap — Classic Wrap
nodes.description: name: Salmon Salad Wrap — Classic Wrap | short_description: A classic Salmon Salad Wrap made with canned salmon, Greek yogurt, celery, greens, and a whole-wheat tortilla. | meal_suggestion: Great for
nodes.premise: Meal: Salmon Salad Wrap — Classic Wrap - name: Salmon Salad Wrap — Classic Wrap | short_description: A classic Salmon Salad Wrap made with canned salmon, Greek yogurt, celery, greens, and a whole-wheat tortilla. | meal_suggestion: Great for a portable lunch. Use one whole-wheat tortilla and fill with the salmon-yogurt mixture and greens; pair with fruit or veggie sticks for balance. For make-ahead prep, store the filling separately and assemble the wrap just before eating to prevent sogginess. | nutrition_note: Protein-packed and rich in omega-3s from salmon and Greek yogurt. Includes fiber from greens, celery, and whole-wheat tortilla. Be mindful of sodium from canned salmon; opt for low-sodium salmon and yogurt if you monitor salt intake.
